title: SenderIdOrSelf::deserialize allocates String for SelfSender case
description: SenderIdOrSelf::Deserialize (types.rs:561) calls String::deserialize which allocates a heap String, then immediately drops it for the 'self' case. Fix: write a custom Visitor that borrows the deserializer input and compares to 'self' before allocating. Impact: one wasted allocation per Message.sender_id and per Reaction entry deserialized when sender is self.
close_reason: Micro-optimization labeled opinion. Immaterial for an HTTP client.
